published_prior_art.cite: DukesShpitserTchetgen2023: completeness is the relevant proximal-identification boundary
DuarteFinkelsteinKnoxMummoloShpitser2024: discrete SCM queries reduce to constrained polynomial programs for sharp bounds
Sjolander2009 and BreumDidelezGabrielSachs2025: no-proxy natural-effect bounds provide the comparison interval
Sjolander2009: the binary randomized-treatment no-proxy mediation model is the stated reduction target

GhassamiShpitserTchetgen2023 supplies no-completeness proxy bounds, but its hidden-mediator setting does not state this observed-mediator, factorized two-proxy strict-contraction certificate; BreumDidelezGabrielSachs2025 supplies the no-proxy floor
BaiWuSunCui2026 and WuBaiCui2026 give proximal recanting-witness identification under bridge conditions

soundness_flags.label: ass:conditional-separation / oeq:robust-strict-contraction
soundness_flags.one_line: The declared range \(\eta\in(0,\infty)\) permits an empty model class (these weighted proxy operators have \(\sigma_2\le1\)); restrict \(\eta\) to a demonstrated feasible range before asking for \(P^\dagger\).

soundness_flags.label: oeq:recanting-extension
soundness_flags.one_line: No recanting-witness variable, extended graph, or path-specific estimand is declared, so the phrase “relevant” constraints in \(\mathscr H_{\mathrm{rw}}\) does not yet define a mathematical question.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: State a nonempty feasible parameter region for \((\kappa,\eta)\), preferably with an explicit rational interior proxy kernel satisfying every singular-value restriction.
Define the recanting-witness extension completely: add its observed variable and DAG, response-type components, nested path-specific target, and the exact failed-completeness conditions.

Strengthen the main question from one certified neighborhood to a characterization of an observable subregion, or derive a computable sufficient condition for strict endpoint exclusion across \((\kappa,\eta)\).

recommended_next_step: Repair the two well-posedness defects, then advance the finite failed-completeness strict-contraction kernel for Stage 0 review.
